title: Popovers
body:
Sunday-morning showstopper. Watching them rise through the oven door is half the fun.

· 1 cup flour
· ¼ teaspoon salt
· 1 cup milk
· 2 large eggs
· 1 tablespoon melted butter

source.label: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
source.ref: Fannie Merritt Farmer · The Boston Cooking-School Cook Book · 1896
